idea.title: Critical Mass
idea.hook: Vent matching fuel cells to generate power, but every cell you leave on the grid heats the core. Hit the shift's power quota before it melts down.
idea.prototype: Portrait reactor-balance management-sim on a 6x9 grid: tap a cluster of 3+ same-colour fuel cells to vent it -> power + a small core cool. Every cell left on the grid bleeds HEAT into the core; the heat gauge only climbs and meltdown at max = lose (gs='GAMEOVER' when heat>=HEAT_MAX). Each shift sets a power quota (QUOTA_BASE + (shift-1)*QUOTA_STEP); fill the bar to clear it, core partial-cools, next shift runs denser + faster. 6 scripted shifts each introduce a NEW cell type in stages: shift2 inert/clog (can't vent, work around), shift3 volatile (heat core fast), shift4 coolant (vent to dump heat), shift5 chain (detonate neighbours), shift6 unstable rods (countdown ring; flood heat when it empties). Clear all 6 -> ENDLESS with rising quotas. Both tap (vent cluster) AND drag (swap adjacent) input. score = lifetime power; bestScore + bestShift persist.
idea.mutation_of: Screw Sort + Pizza Inc (Tile Furnace Factory)
idea.why_novel: first thermal-balance / reactor management-sim in a 168-game portfolio; preserves the proven sort/match-tile mechanic (cleaning family 95% liked, sort retains 81s/play) but adds a non-clock heat-meter pressure + production quota the portfolio has never shipped; re-themed off furnace/smelting to dedup from the existing smelter_tycoon idle-clicker and to land a more dramatic near-critical-reactor cover

sources.title: Tile Furnace Factory (opportunities-2026-06-10)
sources.snippet: score 75.2, build_now, exec 90; mutation_of 'Screw Sort + Pizza Inc'. MECHANIC preserved (sort tiles, manage a heat meter, hit a production quota, overheat = lose); re-themed off furnace/smelting to dedup from existing smelter_tycoon.

sources.title: Screw Sort - Fix & Match Puzzle
sources.snippet: Sort/match-tile puzzle signal on CrazyGames; the source half of the Tile Furnace Factory mutation.

sources.title: Royal Match
sources.snippet: Match-puzzle-with-meta is the dominant casual-puzzle revenue archetype; production-quota + escalating-stage framing borrows its progression legibility.

sources.title: Cleaning / sort retention winners
sources.snippet: Cleaning family is 95% liked; sort games retain ~81s/play. Critical Mass extends the 'satisfying sort/vent' feel while filling the zero thermal-balance/management-sim gap (higher retention ceiling).

synthesizer_brief: KNOWLEDGE pick: take today's build_now 'Tile Furnace Factory' (sort tiles + heat meter + production quota + overheat-loss), re-theme off furnace onto a near-critical nuclear reactor to dedup from smelter_tycoon and earn a dramatic CTR cover, and ship it as the portfolio's first thermal-balance management-sim.
